scripts.wasm: wasm-pack build crates/game-web --target bundler --release --out-dir ../../pkg --out-name brainrot_game_web && node scripts/fix-wasm-package.mjs
scripts.build:preview: pnpm validate:content && pnpm validate:assets && pnpm wasm && rsbuild build
scripts.build:miniapp: pnpm validate:content && pnpm validate:assets && pnpm wasm && rslib build
scripts.build: pnpm build:preview && pnpm build:miniapp && pnpm check:size
scripts.dev: pnpm validate:content && pnpm wasm && rsbuild dev
